game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **던전 추적자 (Dungeon Tracer):** Players navigate a procedurally generated, grid-based dungeon by tapping and dragging to connect adjacent tiles, forming a path that dictates actions like attacking enemies, collecting resources, or activating abilities. Each turn, enemies on the grid perform actions, and the player must strategically connect tiles representing weapons, magic, or defensive actions to manage their health and resources. Progression involves defeating 25 distinct special monsters to gain experience and level up, increasing core stats, while collected gold allows purchasing and upgrading over 400 unique items and unlocking 30 distinct abilities. Difficulty scales through 4 selectable modes, ranging from easy to challenging, and the game ends upon the player character's death, with the objective being to achieve the highest possible score by surviving the longest.
game_info.description: Navigate a dangerous dungeon by connecting adjacent tiles to form powerful combat chains! Each connection activates weapons, magic, or defense against encroaching monsters. Defeat 25 unique special enemies to level up and grow stronger. Collect gold to purchase items and unlock abilities from a vast arsenal. Survive as long as possible to maximize your score before the dungeon claims your life!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and tile cursor in dungeon
Space: Confirm selection, start/end path connection
Shift: Cancel current path connection
Z: Use special ability (when unlocked)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and tile connection mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate the dungeon grid, select tiles, and form valid paths that trigger actions.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Moves cursor to adjacent tiles and connects them to form simple paths. Tests weapon tiles for attacking enemies and resource tiles for collecting gold/health.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully connects tiles, defeats at least one enemy, collects resources, and survives several turns without errors. Test validates core gameplay loop.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement and tile connection mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate the dungeon grid, select tiles, and form valid paths that trigger actions.
TEST_1.strategy: Moves cursor to adjacent tiles and connects them to form simple paths. Tests weapon tiles for attacking enemies and resource tiles for collecting gold/health.
TEST_1.expected: Player successfully connects tiles, defeats at least one enemy, collects resources, and survives several turns without errors. Test validates core gameplay loop.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal winning strategy by efficiently defeating all 25 special monsters. Validates progression system, combat mechanics, and win condition achievement.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritizes high-damage weapon chains, strategic ability usage, and efficient resource management. Focuses on defeating special monsters while maintaining health through defensive tiles and healing. Levels up stats optimally.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeats all 25 special monsters to achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test validates complete gameplay progression and verifies win condition is reachable through skilled play.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests survival under pressure with suboptimal play. Validates that poor decisions lead to eventual defeat and GAME_OVER_LOSE condition.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Makes random connections without strategic planning, ignores defensive tiles, and fails to prioritize threats. Simulates inexperienced player behavior.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player eventually loses all health and reaches GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Test validates that challenge exists and failure states work correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests item purchase system and gold collection mechanics. Validates economy balance and item effects on gameplay.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Focuses on collecting gold tiles and purchasing various items from the shop. Tests that items provide tangible benefits and enhance player capabilities.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Successfully collects gold, purchases multiple items, and benefits from their effects. Test validates economic progression system works as intended.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests ability unlocking and usage system. Validates special ability mechanics and Z key functionality.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Prioritizes unlocking abilities through progression, then strategically uses them in combat situations. Tests cooldown and resource cost mechanics.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Successfully unlocks and uses multiple abilities. Test validates ability system enhances strategic depth and works without errors.
